title: The Ink That Remembers
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a world where tattoos hold memories and indentured scribes carry the histories of noble houses on their skin, a memory-scarred apprentice discovers a lost ink recipe that can rewrite the past.
long_description: In a world where tattoos hold memories and indentured scribes carry the histories of noble houses on their skin, a memory-scarred apprentice discovers a lost ink recipe that can rewrite the past.
